name: Cordon Bleu
recipeIngredient: 4 thin slices Svenbo or Danbo cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound steaks until approximately 4x7 inches.
2. Spread mustard on the surface of each steak.
3. Place a thin slice of ham and a thin slice of cheese on top of each steak (both slices smaller than the steaks).
4. Fold the steaks over to encase the ham and cheese, then secure with skewers.
5. In a shallow dish, mix flour, salt, and pepper.
6. Dip each folded steak in the flour mixture, ensuring both sides are coated.
7. In another shallow dish, beat the egg.
8. Dip each steak in the beaten egg.
9. Finally, coat each steak in bread crumbs.
10. Heat butter in a frying pan over medium heat.
11. Fry steaks for 4 minutes on each side until golden brown.
12. Remove from pan and garnish with lemon and parsley.
13. Serve with vegetables.
Makes 4 servings.
